analysis: 基于本地 DICT 词条整理。该词常见含义与用法可参考离线辞典原始释义。
expansions: / keI; ke/ n (pl K's, k's / keIz; kez/) the eleventh letter of the English alphabet Ӣĸĵʮһĸ: `King' begins with (a) K/`K'
/ keI; ke/ abbr д =  1 kelvin(s).  2 (infml ) one thousand (Greek kilo-) һǧԴϣkilo-: She earns 12K (ie 12000) a year. һ12

translation: 指节；指关节；擦破指关节
analysis:
n  1 bone at the finger-joint 指节; 指关节: graze/skin one's knuckles 擦破指关节. =>illus at hand 见hand插图.  2 (of animals) knee-joint, or the part joining the leg to the foot, esp as a joint of meat （指动物）膝关节, 踝; （尤指食用的）肘: pig's knuckles 猪肘.  3 (idm 习语) a rap on/over the knuckles => rap1.near the `knuckle (infml 口) on the borderline of indecency and therefore likely to offend 近乎下流; 猥亵: Some of his jokes are a bit too near the knuckle for my taste. 我觉得他有的笑话已近乎淫亵了.
knuckle 
v (phr v) knuckle down (to sth) (infml 口) begin to work seriously (at sth) 开始认真工作: If you want to pass that exam, you'll have to knuckle down (to some hard work). 你要想考试及格, 就得开始下功夫（苦干）了. knuckle under (infml 口) accept or admit defeat; surrender 屈服; 认输; 投降.
knuckleduster 
n (US brass knuckles) metal cover worn over the knuckles to increase the injury caused by a blow with the fist 戴在指关节上的金属套（打人时加重损伤）.
knucklehead 
n (infml derog 口, 贬) fool 笨蛋; 傻瓜.
expansions: graze/skin one's knuckles 擦破指关节. =>illus at hand 见hand插图. 2 (of animals) knee-joint, or the part joining the leg to the foot, esp as a joint of meat （指动物）膝关节, 踝; （尤指食用的）肘: pig's knuckles 猪肘. 3 (idm 习语) a rap on/over the knuckles => rap1.near the `knuckle (infml 口) on the borderline of indecency and therefore likely to offend 近乎下流; 猥亵: Some of his jokes are a bit too near the knuckle for my taste. 我觉得他有的笑话已近乎淫亵了.
If you want to pass that exam, you'll have to knuckle down (to some hard work). 你要想考试及格, 就得开始下功夫（苦干）了. knuckle under (infml 口) accept or admit defeat; surrender 屈服; 认输; 投降.

kooky
